id: RR-Y1-019 VBTS measure-event universe intersection — REAL panel (counts only, NO returns)
source: public BIST daily bulletin 'thm' (borsaistanbul.com/data/thm/...), no auth, machine-readable

level_mapping.note: L1 short-ban masked by market-wide ban; L5 channel-restriction not in this file; L3 proxy approximate

measure_entry_events.id: RR-Y1-019 VBTS measure-event universe intersection (counts only, NO returns)
measure_entry_events.class: Phase-1 feasibility; NO return measurement; PIT membership as-of event date
caveats: Counts only — no returns / CAR / price reaction examined (Phase-2 scope).
Membership classified PIT as-of the event date (last panel day <= start_date).
Investable denominator is today's static config list; intra-span change not modelled.
BIST50 not available in the PIT panel; classification is BIST30 / BIST100(>30) / outside.
